{{Quote|We've been able to learn the hyperspace route Lommite Limited's ships are going to take to Eriadu, and the precise reentry coordinates. They'll arrive by way of Rimma 18, and are scheduled to decant from hyperspace at 1300 hours, Eriadu local time.|Adulterated recording of [[Patch Bruit]]|<ref name="DMS" />}}
'''[[Rimma 18]]''' was a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] exit point located within the [[Eriadu system/Legends|Eriadu system]],<ref name="DMS" /> a part of [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="Region" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It shared its name with the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]].<ref name="DMS" />

{{Loc-stub}}
